message:
🐛 fix: dedupe raw-hex comment skip + restore #NNNN refs in test (#8024) (#8029)

Addresses the 2 Copilot review comments on merged PR #8009:

1. detectRawHex had its own comment-line skip block even though
   shouldSkipLine() already filters out //, /*, * lines before any
   detector runs. Moved the {/* (JSX comment) prefix into shouldSkipLine
   so every detector benefits, and removed the duplicate block.

2. The bump-history entries in #8009 changed from "PR #NNNN" to "PR NNNN"
   to sidestep the detector, but that also killed GitHub auto-linking and
   left the file inconsistent with the #NNNN form used elsewhere. Now
   that shouldSkipLine filters comment lines upstream, "#NNNN" refs in
   comments are safe again — restored them.

Fixes #8024

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
